title: The Kingdoms of Ruin
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes. Manga complete at 66 chapters across 15 volumes. The anime adapts the first 33 chapters (through roughly vol. 6-7); chapters 34-66 are unadapted manga-only continuation. Chapter titles from the manga's own chapter list corroborate the episode groupings below (e.g. ch. 10 'The Resurrection of the Witch' opens the Lunamilia arc, ch. 24 'Mamuta, the Ruined Country' opens the Mamuta arc).

mappings.arc: Resurrection and the Invasion of Lunamilia
Journey to the Ruined Kingdom of Mamuta
